headline: Chuckles McGee Laughs So Hard At Own Joke That He Forgets Punchline, Starts Over
summary: The comedy show has been running for 47 minutes on the same joke.
fullBody: Chuckles McGee, the self-proclaimed 'funniest man in Chuckleton,' performed a 90-minute set that consisted entirely of one joke—because he kept laughing so hard at the setup that he forgot the punchline. 'It's a new style of comedy called 'anticipatory hilarity,'' McGee explained. The audience was reportedly 'confused but charmed.' One attendee said, 'I think I laughed eventually, but I'm not sure why.' McGee plans to release a Netflix special titled 'I'll Get There Eventually.'
